note: The single-normalizer CPMM cannot simultaneously match both targets exactly. At 10bp / $17.2B, vol_share=31.5% (target 31.1%) is close, but fee_share=18.7% overshoots the 15.5% target by 3pp. This is because real competing liquidity is heterogeneous (v4 1bp, v3 30bp, Balancer, etc.) and cannot be perfectly represented by a single pool.
